hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.css$' && npx stylelint "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(css|md|html|njk)$' && node ./scripts/check-violations.js "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
git log --oneline -1 --format=%H 2>/dev/null | { read -r h; [ -n "$h" ] && npm run sync:starter 2>/dev/null || true; }
